user.title: Connect to AZ Router
user.description: Enter connection details for your AZ Router web interface.

set_master_boost.name: Master Boost
set_master_boost.description: Enable or disable Master Boost on the main AZ Router unit.

set_device_boost.name: Device Boost
set_device_boost.description: Enable or disable Boost on one or more devices.

set_device_type_1_keep_heated.name: Smart Slave – 3.1 Keep Heated
set_device_type_1_keep_heated.description: Enable or disable 3.1 Keep Heated (ignore_cycle) for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

set_device_type_1_block_solar_heating.name: Smart Slave – 3.2 Block Solar Heating
set_device_type_1_block_solar_heating.description: Enable or disable 3.2 Block Solar Heating (block_solar_heating) for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = block solar heating, False = allow solar heating.

set_device_type_1_block_heating_from_bat.name: Smart Slave – 3.3 Block Heating From Battery
set_device_type_1_block_heating_from_bat.description: Enable or disable 3.3 Block Heating From Battery (block_heating_from_battery) for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = block heating from battery, False = allow heating from battery.

set_device_type_1_allow_solar_heating_on.name: Smart Slave – 3.4 Only In Time Window
set_device_type_1_allow_solar_heating_on.description: Enable or disable the 3.4 Allow Solar Heating Only In Time Window restriction for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = allow solar heating only in the configured time window, False = no time-window restriction.

set_device_type_1_boost_mode.name: Smart Slave – 4.2 Boost Mode
set_device_type_1_boost_mode.description: Set 4.2 Boost Mode for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: One of: manual, hdo, window, window+hdo.

set_device_type_1_connected_phase.name: Smart Slave – Connected Phase
set_device_type_1_connected_phase.description: Connect or disconnect the selected phase (1.1/1.2/1.3 Connected L1/L2/L3) for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = phase connected, False = phase disconnected.

set_device_type_1_max_power.name: Smart Slave – Max Power
set_device_type_1_max_power.description: Set the maximum allowed load power for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

set_device_type_1_temperatures.name: Smart Slave – Temperatures
set_device_type_1_temperatures.description: Set target and/or Boost temperatures for Smart Slave devices (deviceType=1).

set_device_type_4_block_charging.name: Wallbox – 1. Block Charging
set_device_type_4_block_charging.description: Enable or disable 1. Block Charging for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = block charging, False = allow charging.

set_device_type_4_prioritize_when_connec.name: Wallbox – 2. Prioritize When Connected
set_device_type_4_prioritize_when_connec.description: Enable or disable 2. Prioritize When Connected (mode[0].enabled) for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = mode enabled, False = mode disabled.

set_device_type_4_block_solar_charging.name: Wallbox – 3. Block Solar Charging
set_device_type_4_block_solar_charging.description: Enable or disable 3. Block Solar Charging for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = block solar charging, False = allow solar charging.

set_device_type_4_block_charging_from_ba.name: Wallbox – 4. Block Charging From Battery
set_device_type_4_block_charging_from_ba.description: Enable or disable 4. Block Charging From Battery for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = block charging from battery, False = allow charging from battery.

set_device_type_4_allow_solar_charging_o.name: Wallbox – 6.1 Only In Time Window
set_device_type_4_allow_solar_charging_o.description: Enable or disable the 6.1 Allow Solar Charging Only In Time Window restriction for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = allow solar charging only in the configured time window, False = no time-window restriction.

set_device_type_4_trigger_phase.name: Wallbox – 5. Triggering Phase
set_device_type_4_trigger_phase.description: Set 5. Triggering Phase for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

set_device_type_4_apply_only_if_cloud_is.name: Wallbox – 8. Only If Cloud Is Offline
set_device_type_4_apply_only_if_cloud_is.description: Enable or disable 8. Apply Only If Cloud Is Offline for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = apply only when the cloud is offline, False = apply always.

set_device_type_4_time_window_charging_e.name: Wallbox – 9.1 Time Window Charging
set_device_type_4_time_window_charging_e.description: Enable or disable 9.1 Time Window Charging Enabled (mode[2].enabled) for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = mode enabled, False = mode disabled.

set_device_type_4_hdo_charging_enabled.name: Wallbox – 10.1 HDO Charging
set_device_type_4_hdo_charging_enabled.description: Enable or disable 10.1 HDO Charging Enabled (mode[3].enabled) for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True = mode enabled, False = mode disabled.

set_device_type_4_manual_power.name: Wallbox – Manual Charging Power
set_device_type_4_manual_power.description: Set the manual charging power limit for Wallbox devices (deviceType=4). The allowed limit depends on the installed circuit breaker.

manual_power.name: Manual Charging Power (W)
manual_power.description: Charging power in watts. The valid range is automatically checked based on the device’s circuit breaker.
